title: SEISSO New Upgrade 12 Colors Furniture Markers Touch Up Pen, Laminate Floor Repair Kit, Professional Wood Repair Kit for Floor Furniture Scratches, Stains, Crack, Wood Laminate
features: 🖍️【Product Details】12 colors of new and upgraded furniture touch-up pen marker. 12 colors specially developed according to various common wood colors can meet all your wood furniture restoration needs!
🖍️【Complete Colors】Black, Gray, White, Mahogany, Maple, Oak, Cherry, Walnut, Chestnut, Burnt Sienna, Espresso and Bamboo to match the color of your furniture.

🖍️【Wide Application】Suitable for scratches on the surface of wooden veneers, desks, wooden floors, cabinets, tables, beds, doors, etc. Recover various damages, such as debris, cracks, dents, holes, pet marks and wear. You can repair the furniture yourself, no professionals are required. Save your money and time, make your furniture new again.
🖍️【Easy to Use】Dry in seconds, no more visible scratches, or dents, should be in everyone's home DIY toolbox! Let you do it yourself to achieve the level of professional restoration!
🖍️【100% Satisfied Service】 We promise to provide you with 100% satisfactory service, if our products make you have any dissatisfaction, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Multiple Colors Premium Wood Scratch Repair Markers Multiple colors to ensure the closest match with your furniture. Scratches Paint Peeling Stains Use on Many Types of Wood This product is suitable for a variety of different woods. Bamboo, walnut, oak, cherry, chestnut, maple, etc., these common woods can be repaired in suitable colors from the set. Easy to Use Dry in seconds, no more visible scratches, dents, should be in everyone's home DIY toolbox! Good Coverage These markers perfectly covers furniture color differences due to various reasons. Excellent coverage is a big plus of this product!
